title: tephrosia racemosa
intro: Tephrosia racemosa, also known as the Clusterbean or Katul, is a perennial legume native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia racemosa include the potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. In traditional herbal medicine, Tephrosia racemosa is prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to be used for medicinal purposes.
